items.title: State of AI in Nepal 2026: Industry Report
items.subtitle: The definitive guide to AI adoption across Nepali industries
items.description: Nepal ranks 150th globally in AI readiness, yet adoption is accelerating. This report analyzes AI implementation across 50+ Nepali organizations, identifies key barriers, and provides a roadmap for businesses in Kathmandu and beyond.
whatYouGet: AI readiness assessment framework for Nepal market
Industry-by-industry adoption analysis (IT, Finance, Healthcare, Manufacturing)
Budget benchmarks: What Nepali companies invest in AI (NPR 50K to 50M)
Skills gap analysis and training recommendations
Regulatory landscape and data privacy considerations
5-year AI adoption forecast for Nepal
Case studies from 5 Kathmandu-based companies

items.subtitle: Key findings on how businesses are replacing keyword search with AI-native solutions
items.description: Based on research from 500+ enterprise technology leaders globally, this report reveals how organizations are transitioning from traditional keyword search to AI-native natural language understanding. Includes benchmarks, ROI data, and implementation timelines.

items.title: AI-Native Search for Nepal: Beyond Keyword Search
items.subtitle: How Nepali businesses can leapfrog legacy search technology
items.description: Traditional keyword search fails when users don't know the exact terms. AI-native search understands intent, handles Nepali-English mixed queries, and delivers direct answers. This guide shows Nepal businesses how to implement it.

items.title: How Khushbu Nirman Sewa Digitized Construction Management
items.subtitle: AI-powered project tracking and resource optimization in Nepal's construction sector
items.description: Khushbu Nirman Sewa, a leading Kathmandu construction company, transformed their project management with Zunkiree's AI-powered tracking system. This case study details their journey from paper-based processes to real-time AI insights.
results: NPR 2.5 crore saved in first year
items.challenge: Managing 15+ construction sites across Kathmandu Valley with paper-based tracking, leading to delayed updates, resource misallocation, and cost overruns.
items.solution: Implemented Zunkiree's AI-powered project management platform with mobile data collection, automated resource optimization, and predictive delay alerts.

items.title: Nepali Language AI: Building Chatbots & Search in Nepali
items.subtitle: Technical guide to NLP for the Nepali language
items.description: Building AI systems that understand Nepali presents unique challenges: limited training data, complex morphology, and code-switching with English. This technical guide covers practical solutions for Nepali NLP in production.
whatYouGet: Overview of Nepali NLP landscape and available tools
Handling Devanagari script in ML pipelines
Code-switching: When users mix Nepali and English
Training data strategies for low-resource language
Integration with existing Nepali language models
Building Nepali chatbots: Practical walkthrough
Evaluation metrics for Nepali NLP systems
